text: Head of the Office of the President of Ukraine, Kyrylo Budanov: We will never renounce our territories. Never recognize occupation. This is our land, we cannot trade it.
text_zh: 乌克兰总统办公室主任，基里洛·布达诺夫：我们永远不会放弃我们的领土。永远不会承认占领。这是我们的土地，我们不能拿它做交易。

text: Head of the Office of the President of Ukraine, Kyrylo Budanov: Nobody in Ukraine would agree to lose even an inch of territory. Nobody wants to deal with the weak — international law doesn’t work here.
text_zh: 乌克兰总统办公室主任，基里洛·布达诺夫：乌克兰没有人会同意失去哪怕一英寸的领土。没有人愿意与弱者打交道——国际法在这里不起作用。

text: — 🇮🇱 / 🇵🇸 Tamir Pardo, former Mossad Chief (2011-2016) during a tour in the West Bank: ‘My mother is a Holocaust survivor, and what I saw here [against Palestinians] reminds me of the persecution against Jews in the previous century’ @Middle_East_Spectator
text_zh: — 🇮🇱 / 🇵🇸 前摩萨德局长（2011-2016）塔米尔·帕尔多在约旦河西岸巡视期间表示：“我的母亲是大屠杀幸存者，我在这里看到的（针对巴勒斯坦人的行为）让我想起了上个世纪对犹太人的迫害” @Middle_East_Spectator

text: ❗️ Hezbullah's attack yesterday with a fixed-wing suicide drone hit an IDF group. An IDF soldier was severely wounded and another was lightly hurt.
text_zh: ❗️ 真主党昨天使用固定翼自杀式无人机袭击了一个以色列国防军小组。一名以色列国防军士兵受重伤，另一名受轻伤。

text: Nuno Felix Barak Ravid being the good stenographer "This is maximum pressure everywhere and from all angles," a senior administration official said. "That could mean military action, too. It might not. It's up to the president." @MarcACaputo, @BarakRavid https://www.axios.com/2026/04/28/iran-war-peace-talks-stalemate - Shalom Lipner tweet

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Axios: The conflict with Iran is increasingly resembling a Cold War-style standoff, marked by sanctions, naval pressure and stalled diplomacy rather than active large-scale fighting. U.S. President Trump and his advisers remain divided over next steps, with some favouring continued economic pressure while others support renewed military action. Several U.S. officials fear getting drawn into a long drawn out frozen conflict. This would be a disaster for the Trump administration with November midterms approaching and energy prices rising due to the conflict. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Axios：与伊朗的冲突越来越像冷战式的对峙，其特点是制裁、海军压力和外交停滞，而不是大规模的积极战斗。美国总统特朗普及其顾问在下一步行动上仍存在分歧，一些人主张继续施加经济压力，而另一些人则支持重启军事行动。几位美国官员担心被卷入一场旷日持久的冻结冲突。随着11月中期选举临近，能源价格因冲突而上涨，这对特朗普政府来说将是一场灾难。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 🇮🇱 Multiple Israeli jets were just heard over Southern Syria. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 🇮🇱 刚刚听到多架以色列喷气式飞机飞越叙利亚南部上空。 @wfwitness

text: Israelis were surrounded and shouted at by locals in Cusco, Peru, who accuse them of being “murderers”, “baby killers” and “war criminals” and tell them to leave.
text_zh: 以色列人在秘鲁库斯科被当地人包围并大声呵斥，当地人指责他们是“杀人犯”、“杀婴者”和“战犯”，并叫他们离开。

text: 🇺🇦 ⚔️ 🇷🇺 Ukraine carried out another drone strike on Russia’s Tuapse oil refinery. The strike hit remaining fuel storage tanks, the facility was already heavily damaged. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 ⚔️ 🇷🇺 乌克兰对俄罗斯图阿普谢炼油厂进行了另一次无人机袭击。袭击击中了剩余的燃料储罐，该设施此前已严重受损。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Ukraine carried out another drone strike on Russia’s Tuapse oil refinery, marking the third major attack this month. The strike hit remaining fuel storage tanks, causing new explosions and large fires. The facility was already heavily damaged.
text_zh: 乌克兰对俄罗斯图阿普谢炼油厂进行了另一次无人机袭击，这是本月第三次重大袭击。袭击击中了剩余的燃料储罐，引发了新的爆炸和大火。该设施此前已严重受损。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇪🇬 🇵🇸 🇮🇱 i24NEWS: Senior members of U.S. President Trump’s peace team and Hamas representatives are expected to meet in Cairo in the coming days for another round of talks focused on the group’s disarmament. Sources report that progress has been made on Hamas disarmament but a breakthrough is still elusive. Hamas has not formally rejected the latest proposal for a disarmament framework. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇪🇬 🇵🇸 🇮🇱 i24NEWS：预计美国总统特朗普和平团队的高级成员与哈马斯代表将在未来几天在开罗会面，进行新一轮旨在讨论该组织解除武装的会谈。消息人士称，在哈马斯解除武装方面已取得进展，但突破仍难以实现。哈马斯尚未正式拒绝关于解除武装框架的最新提议。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Nuno Felix This article is a bunch of stacked up wrong analyses. First, yes the ammo shortages are a thing but due to lack of preparation for drone warfare. However they are not as extensive as some like to think. Second: Air superiority has nothing to do with drone warfare. NATO would establish air superiority against the Russian AF, but currently would suffer from deep strike capabilities the Russians possess. The two are not the same and are tangencial. Also, we can produce an awful lot of drones particularly through UA. We have chosen not to for the most part. BMs is the particular area where Russians are ahead. Third: the Royal Navy issues are not a symptom of lack of ships by NATO. Somehow it completely ignores France and Italy. And it ignores the fact that most Northern European Navies kept their assets where they should be, in the North. Sure ASW is a problem, when has it not been a problem? Sure Russian subs can shoot missiles at land targets, so can we. Fourth: disunity? Well the US is the focus of disunity, European NATO has hardly ever been more united. There are problems and lessons from the Iran war, but the most important should be ISTAR against a foe that operates in a decentralized and concealed manner is particularly difficult. Also the enemy can interpret, analyze and mitigate doctrine. They are smart. NATO has stayed out of the U.S.-Israeli war in Iran, but the conflict has exposed cracks in its defenses that could leave it struggling in the event of a Russian attack. Here are the five gaps in the alliance: https://www.politico.eu/article/5-ways-iran-war-nato-weakness-russia-conflict/ - POLITICOEurope tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Nuno Felix：这篇文章堆砌了一堆错误的分析。首先，是的，弹药短缺确实存在，但这是由于对无人机战争缺乏准备。然而，它们并不像某些人想象的那么严重。其次：空中优势与无人机战争无关。北约会对俄罗斯空军建立空中优势，但目前会受到俄罗斯拥有的远程打击能力的困扰。两者并不相同，且关系不大。此外，我们可以生产大量的无人机，特别是通过乌克兰。我们大部分时间选择了不这样做。弹道导弹是俄罗斯领先的特定领域。第三：英国皇家海军的问题并不是北约缺乏舰艇的征兆。它在某种程度上完全忽略了法国和意大利。它还忽略了大多数北欧海军将其资产保留在应有的位置——即北方的事实。当然，反潜战是一个问题，但它什么时候不是个问题呢？当然，俄罗斯潜艇可以向陆地目标发射导弹，我们也可以。第四：不团结？好吧，美国是分裂的焦点，欧洲北约几乎从未如此团结。伊朗战争中存在问题和教训，但最重要的一点应该是，针对以分散和隐蔽方式行动的敌人进行情报、监视、目标获取和侦察（ISTAR）尤其困难。此外，敌人可以解读、分析和缓解条令。他们很聪明。北约没有介入美以在伊朗的战争，但这场冲突暴露了其防御体系中的裂痕，如果发生俄罗斯的攻击，可能会使其陷入困境。以下是该联盟的五个差距：https://www.politico.eu/article/5-ways-iran-war-nato-weakness-russia-conflict/ - POLITICOEurope 推文

text: Visioner 🇷🇺 The famous Russian imperialist and former leader of the Donbas separatists, Igor Girkin-Strelkov, called on the Russian population to prepare for defeat. 📌 "Unfortunately, we are heading towards a military defeat - that is a fact. Let's not rush to admit it, but at least let's acknowledge this unpleasant reality and start from the premise that the threat is real. Also from the reality that Ukraine will continue to be supplied with everything it needs, while we still do nothing serious to prevent this threat," Strelkov responded to the $90 billion loan allocated to Ukraine. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇷🇺 著名的俄罗斯帝国主义者、顿巴斯分裂分子前领导人伊戈尔·基尔金-斯特列尔科夫呼吁俄罗斯民众为失败做好准备。📌 “不幸的是，我们正走向军事失败——这是一个事实。让我们不要急于承认这一点，但至少让我们承认这个令人不快的现实，并从威胁是真实的这一前提出发。还要从乌克兰将继续获得所需一切供应的现实出发，而我们仍然没有采取任何严肃措施来阻止这种威胁，”斯特列尔科夫在回应分配给乌克兰的900亿美元贷款时说道。推文

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Bloomberg: Iran’s unused oil storage capacity has fallen to between 12 and 22 days or less, increasing pressure on Tehran’s oil sector amid ongoing export disruptions. Kpler analysts said the shrinking storage space raises the possibility Iran may be forced to cut crude production by another 1.5 million barrels per day by mid-May. Iran has already reduced output significantly in recent weeks, as unsold crude accumulates and storage facilities near capacity. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 彭博社：伊朗未使用的石油储存能力已降至12至22天或更短，在出口持续中断的情况下，增加了德黑兰石油部门的压力。Kpler分析师表示，储存空间缩减增加了伊朗可能被迫在5月中旬前将原油产量再削减每天150万桶的可能性。由于未售出的原油积压且储存设施接近饱和，伊朗在最近几周已经大幅减产。@wfwitness

text: Greece’s ruling party is clashing with EU prosecutors over a huge farm subsidy corruption scandal involving hundreds of millions of euros. Several politicians are implicated. The government is attacking the EU investigation, calling it political interference and even threatening to pull out of cooperation, while the EU prosecutor insists the focus is on systemic corruption, nepotism, and fraud. Source: Politico
text_zh: 希腊执政党正与欧盟检察官就一起涉及数亿欧元的巨额农业补贴腐败丑闻发生冲突。多名政客牵涉其中。政府正在攻击欧盟的调查，称其为政治干预，甚至威胁要退出合作，而欧盟检察官则坚持认为重点是系统性腐败、任人唯亲和欺诈。来源：Politico

text: Serbia's President Aleksandar Vučić: If I were American, I would have voted for Donald Trump. He was speaking about family values, and people here like that.
text_zh: 塞尔维亚总统亚历山大·武契奇：如果我是美国人，我会投票给唐纳德·特朗普。他谈到了家庭价值观，这里的人们喜欢这一点。

text: Serbia's President Aleksandar Vučić: I cannot justify everything, but I am still a friend of Israel. You cannot say it’s not a violation of international law to attack a sovereign country like Iran.

text: ⚡️ 🇲🇽 🇺🇸 WSJ : Mexican President Claudia Sheinbaum is facing intense political pressure after making a series of concessions to U.S. President Trump. Including deploying National Guard troops to the border, cutting oil shipments to Cuba, imposing tariffs on Chinese goods, and expelling jailed cartel bosses to the US. Despite her efforts, Trump has continued to demand more, threatening unilateral military action against cartels on Mexican soil. The relationship was further strained last week when two CIA officials died in a car crash in northern Mexico while participating in a counternarcotics operation. Sheinbaum struck a muted response, blaming the opposition governor rather than the U.S., and sent a diplomatic note requesting information. Sheinbaum’s advisers say her strategy is to stave off a U.S. military strike and maintain Mexico’s trade position, but critics warn she is alienating her leftist base. Former foreign minister Jorge Castañeda said: “I disagree with almost everything she has done, but I don’t know what she could have done differently.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇲🇽 🇺🇸 《华尔街日报》：墨西哥总统克劳迪娅·辛鲍姆在向美国总统特朗普做出了一系列让步后，正面临巨大的政治压力。这些让步包括向边境部署国民警卫队、削减对古巴的石油运输、对中国商品征收关税，以及将入狱的贩毒集团头目驱逐到美国。尽管她做出了努力，特朗普仍继续提出更多要求，威胁要对墨西哥境内的贩毒集团采取单方面军事行动。上周，两名中央情报局官员在墨西哥北部参与禁毒行动时死于车祸，这使得两国关系进一步紧张。辛鲍姆反应平淡，将责任归咎于反对派州长而非美国，并发送了一份外交照会要求提供信息。辛鲍姆的顾问表示，她的策略是阻止美国的军事打击并维持墨西哥的贸易地位，但批评人士警告称，她正在疏远她的左翼支持者。前外交部长豪尔赫·卡斯塔涅达表示：“我几乎不同意她所做的一切，但我不知道她还能有什么不同的做法。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 A few moments ago Israeli airstrikes also struck the town of Tebnine, southern Lebanon. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Israeli airstrike on the town of Yater, southern Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 片刻前，以色列空袭也袭击了黎巴嫩南部的泰布宁镇。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列空袭黎巴嫩南部的亚特镇。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇵🇭 🇺🇸 🇨🇳 🇯🇵 Reuters : Philippine Defence Secretary Gilberto Teodoro said he is not concerned that the Iran war will reduce U.S. deterrence in the Indo‑Pacific. “I’m not concerned at all about reduced deterrence,” he told Reuters, pointing to annual joint military drills as a sign of Washington’s commitment. Teodoro warned that China could take advantage of any perceived opening, citing recent Chinese naval activity around Taiwan and the installation of a barrier at the Scarborough Shoal. He said the Philippines will take advantage of Japan’s decision to scrap restrictions on arms exports, possibly acquiring frigates from Tokyo. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇵🇭 🇺🇸 🇨🇳 🇯🇵 路透社：菲律宾国防部长吉尔伯托·特奥多罗表示，他不担心伊朗战争会削弱美国在印太地区的威慑力。他告诉路透社：“我一点也不担心威慑力会减弱”，并指出年度联合军事演习是华盛顿承诺的标志。特奥多罗警告称，中国可能会利用任何被认为出现的缺口，并提到了近期中国在台湾周边的海军活动以及在黄岩岛安装屏障的行为。他表示，菲律宾将利用日本取消武器出口限制的决定，可能会从东京采购护卫舰。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 A few moments ago Israeli airstrikes also struck the town of Tebnine, southern Lebanon. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Footage of the Israeli airstrike on Tebnine behind the governmental hospital and in close proximity of the Lebanese Red Cross. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 片刻前，以色列空袭也袭击了黎巴嫩南部的泰布宁镇。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列空袭泰布宁政府医院后方及黎巴嫩红十字会附近区域的画面。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇨🇳 WSJ : Iran is flooded with so much unsold oil that it is resorting to makeshift storage, using derelict “junk storage” sites, containers, and even trying to ship crude by rail to China. A U.S. naval blockade has slashed Iranian crude loadings from 2.1 million barrels per day in early April to just 567,000 barrels per day between 14‑23 April. Before the war, Iran exported 2 million barrels per day. Kpler estimates that if the blockade holds, Iranian crude production could fall by more than half, to 1.2‑1.3 million barrels per day, by mid‑May. Onshore oil inventories have swelled by 4.6 million barrels to roughly 49 million barrels, near capacity estimated at 86‑95 million barrels. Shutting production abruptly risks damaging older, low‑pressure oil fields. Brent crude rose nearly 3% to $108.23 a barrel amid the deadlock. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇨🇳 《华尔街日报》：伊朗充斥着大量未售出的石油，以至于不得不诉诸临时存储，使用废弃的“垃圾存储”点、集装箱，甚至试图通过铁路将原油运往中国。美国的封锁已将伊朗的原油装载量从4月初的每天210万桶削减至4月14日至23日期间的每天仅56.7万桶。战争前，伊朗每天出口200万桶。Kpler估计，如果封锁持续，到5月中旬，伊朗的原油产量可能会减半以上，降至每天120万至130万桶。陆上石油库存增加了460万桶，达到约4900万桶，接近估计的8600万至9500万桶的容量。突然关闭生产可能会损坏较旧的低压油田。在僵局中，布伦特原油价格上涨近3%，至每桶108.23美元。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 CNN: The United States and Iran may not be as far apart as they seem. Intense diplomacy continues behind the scenes, focused on a staged process: the first phase would return to the pre‑war status quo and reopen the Strait of Hormuz without restrictions…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 CNN: U.S. President Trump is unlikely to accept Iran’s latest proposal to end the war, according to sources familiar with the matter. Iran’s offer would set aside discussion of its nuclear programme until after the conflict ends and shipping disputes are resolved – a condition Washington is unwilling to accept. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国有线电视新闻网（CNN）：美国和伊朗之间的分歧可能并不像看起来那么大。幕后外交活动仍在激烈进行，重点是一个分阶段的进程：第一阶段将恢复战前现状，并无限制地重新开放霍尔木兹海峡……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国有线电视新闻网（CNN）：据知情人士透露，美国总统特朗普不太可能接受伊朗提出的最新停战建议。伊朗的提议将搁置对其核计划的讨论，直到冲突结束且航运纠纷得到解决——这是华盛顿不愿接受的条件。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 Footage showcasing the airstrikes that targeted the town of Shaqra, southern Lebanon. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Israeli airstrike on the town of Brachit, Southern Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 展示针对黎巴嫩南部沙克拉镇空袭的画面。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列空袭黎巴嫩南部布拉奇特镇。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 Reuters: U.S. President Trump is unhappy with Iran’s latest proposal to end the two‑month war, a US official said. Iran’s proposal would set aside discussion of its nuclear programme until after the war ends and shipping disputes are resolved. Washington…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 CNN : The United States and Iran may not be as far apart as they seem. Intense diplomacy continues behind the scenes, focused on a staged process: the first phase would return to the pre‑war status quo and reopen the Strait of Hormuz without restrictions or tolls. The nuclear programme – cited by the US and Israel as the casus belli – would be addressed later. Mediators are pressing both sides to reach an agreement, with the coming days especially crucial. The risk remains that Washington may disengage and return to war. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 路透社：一名美国官员称，美国总统特朗普对伊朗提出的结束两个月战争的最新建议感到不满。伊朗的提议将搁置对其核计划的讨论，直到战争结束且航运纠纷得到解决。华盛顿……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国有线电视新闻网（CNN）：美国和伊朗之间的分歧可能并不像看起来那么大。幕后外交活动仍在激烈进行，重点是一个分阶段的进程：第一阶段将恢复战前现状，并无限制、无收费地重新开放霍尔木兹海峡。被美国和以色列视为战争借口的核计划将在稍后处理。调解人正在敦促双方达成协议，未来几天尤为关键。华盛顿仍存在脱离接触并重返战争的风险。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 Two Israeli airstrikes on the town of Shaqra. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Footage showcasing the airstrikes that targeted the town of Shaqra, southern Lebanon. @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Zelensky to Israel: "Buying stolen goods is a crime, this includes grain stolen by Russia. This is not and cannot be legitimate business. Israel cannot claim it doesn't know what enters its ports. We took all diplomatic steps, yet the ship was not stopped. We will sanction those transporting and profiting from this. We expect respect, and no actions that undermine our relations." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 泽连斯基对以色列表示：“购买赃物是犯罪，这包括俄罗斯窃取的谷物。这不是也不可能是合法生意。以色列不能声称不知道进入其港口的是什么。我们采取了所有外交步骤，但船只并未被拦截。我们将制裁那些运输并从中获利的人。我们期待尊重，不希望看到任何破坏我们关系的行动。” 推文
